summary: End-to-end workflow for developing new skills with proper authoring, validation, dossier creation, and fixture generation.

inputs.name: skill_requirement
inputs.description: The requirement specification for the new skill.

inputs.name: domain_context
inputs.description: Domain context and existing skills in the target domain.

inputs.name: dossier_sources
inputs.description: Sources to build the skill dossier from.

outputs.name: skill_specification
outputs.description: Complete skill specification in SKILL.md format.

outputs.name: skill_dossier
outputs.description: Dossier with source provenance and quality score.

outputs.name: skill_fixtures
outputs.description: Test fixtures for the new skill.

budget.notes: Stay focused on skill development lifecycle only.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is new skill development, not modification or deletion.
Require skill requirement and domain context before authoring begins.
Skill specification must pass format and content validation.
Dossier score must be >= 80 before promotion to staging.
Return skill spec, dossier, and fixtures with all gates passed.

steps.action: Author the skill specification with triggers, steps, quality gates, and handoffs.
Review the skill design for architectural fit and system impact.
Evaluate or create the skill dossier with source provenance.
Generate test fixtures for the new skill (3 fixtures minimum).
Run final validation on the complete skill package.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read existing skills, registry data, and source materials.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write skill specification, dossier, and fixture files.

tools.name: shell.readonly
tools.purpose: Run validation scripts during skill development.

verification.method: Check skill specification has all required frontmatter fields and content sections.
Check test fixtures exist for the new skill (minimum 3).

success_criteria: Skill specification passes format and content validation.
Dossier score is >= 80 with complete provenance.
Test fixtures cover trigger scenarios and edge cases.

rollback.when: If any gate fails, revert to the step before the failure and report the issue.
